ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course (e.g., ART101) */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course (e.g., Art History I) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites required for the course */,
  "corequisites" TEXT /* Corequisites required for the course */,
  "is_web_based" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is web-based */,
  "course_level" INTEGER /* Level of the course (e.g., 100, 200, 300, 400) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the course */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., lecture, lab, seminar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the section belongs to */,
  "section_code" TEXT /* Code of the section (e.g., WB) */,
  "section_type" TEXT /* Type of the section (e.g., LEC, LEC/LAB) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the section */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester the section is offered in */,
  "section_status" TEXT /* Status of the section (e.g., open, full, closed) */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the section */,
  "current_students" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the section */,
  "web_based_details" TEXT /* Additional details for web-based sections */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the section */,
  "is_waitlisted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the section has a waitlist */,
  "waitlist_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the waitlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Details of the instructor's office hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Chairperson of the department */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the semester (e.g., active, planned, past) */,
  "registration_start" TEXT /* Start date of registration */,
  "registration_end" TEXT /* End date of registration */,
  "exam_start" TEXT /* Start date of exams */,
  "exam_end" TEXT /* End date of exams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_times" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting time */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the meeting time belongs to */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the section meets */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the meeting */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the meeting */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room where the section meets */,
  "is_synchronous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the meeting time is synchronous */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link for web-based meetings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_times_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_times_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the room is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the room (number of students) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the room (e.g., projector, whiteboard) */,
  "is_accessible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the room is accessible */,
  "is_reserved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the room is reserved */,
  "last_reserved_date" TEXT /* Last date the room was reserved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's major */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the student (e.g., freshman, sophomore) */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor of the student */,
  "is_international" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is international */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the major */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the major */,
  "total_credits_required" INTEGER /* Total credits required for the major */,
  "core_courses" TEXT /* List of core courses required for the major */,
  "additional_requirements" TEXT /* Additional requirements for the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the section */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the student is enrolling in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped, completed) */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student in the section */,
  "is_transfer" INTEGER /* Indicates if the enrollment is a transfer credit */,
  "is_audit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the enrollment is for audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the note is associated with */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or special instruction */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the note */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the note is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, instructor, student) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., course, section, student) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "prerequisite_type" TEXT /* Type of the prerequisite (e.g., required, recommended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_corequisites" (
  "corequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "corequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corequisite course */,
  "corequisite_type" TEXT /* Type of the corequisite (e.g., required, recommended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_corequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_corequisites_corequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("corequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
